mapper.select: SELECT a.MEMBER_ID, a.MEMBER_NAME, (SELECT LISTAGG(AUTH_ID,',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(AUTH_ID)) FROM CMS_MEMBER_AUTH WHERE MEMBER_ID = a.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY MEMBER_ID) AS AUTH_ID FROM CMS_MEMBER a
SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, AUTH_ID FROM CMS_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID NOT IN (SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM CMS_MEMBER_AUTH WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id})
